records.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 7.1 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.representation: convergent standard sparse m16n8k64 wrapping s4-by-s4 INT4 inline PTX through CUDA 13.3 libNVVM
stages.detail: The same 7,822-byte NVVM IR fixture (SHA-256 ea46feacc7fcd1c5ae768178ec7ad5cb97a85c892ca6317fbe4a13c72dafbc33) passed CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and produced 4,979-byte NUL-terminated PTX (SHA-256 abe6ae9238f6137de91c9c2214fc9d7aa78da2bdd6d60a75013f45866c60c38f) containing all eight variants with selectors 0 and 1. Every standard-metadata nibble must encode two distinct 2-bit indices; 0x0, 0x5, 0xa, and 0xf are undefined behavior. This record retained exact wrapping s4-by-s4 PTX. Production cargo oxide emit-ltoir generated_intrinsics --arch=sm_80 emitted 374,720-byte NVVM IR (SHA-256 d8180177c4f4e54c641636f7d894fa01314ca6c9251a423ef9027e1985ae120b) and 104,032-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 9f451bb1d66eb39596d0639eb95cf2712e82975f518cf89829eaf18fb5fb15f0). Its 25-byte sm_80 target manifest (SHA-256 06ecfb1b0100fd9886f26871a9fc48350b612a35370b154b07d83a3a57fbbadb) and 49-byte compile-options file (SHA-256 069d630cf5359ec49a571d9074d106aeda207bc279693d2a9ce3c21b168ad03a) pin the production inputs.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 emitted standard sparse m16n8k64 INT4 PTX
stages.detail: After removing libNVVM's single trailing NUL, CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 4,978-byte PTX (SHA-256 7b24a91e649c24cd57c20d6923a0940730b9465107178b227921b8d5f0a478d2), issued only the ordered-metadata performance advisory, and produced a 4,008-byte cubin (SHA-256 109d906a6082234019e136181d47d7306c65edbedf5c47e3c46ef56635fa6ca6) with exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. The PTX 7.0, sm_75, selector 2, and dynamic-selector negatives are recorded by the paired pinned-LLVM evidence.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and nvJitLink standard sparse m16n8k64 INT4 fixture
stages.detail: The direct CUDA 13.3 libNVVM-to-nvJitLink route produced a 4,008-byte cubin with SHA-256 3cc463ee7fdde107bbd51039c7a2259f62196923d049c78703e3662cccc378f5 retaining exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. Production linking of that LTOIR through the repository nvJitLink helper produced a 30,952-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 9c9f270e43b9732e814f899d9aeba2dc6f20aef85769bc83eaae8e345cb82ae6). Independent 92,603-byte nvdisasm (SHA-256 dd862d50b376cc5ae8cd083b71d5da500a751b44c4016ab5d6b3c838960cbc7e) and 349,080-byte cuobjdump (SHA-256 44f234c740a4c6f1b3dd917b979a9f495e7e838343130185febc9c604a3e84ca) views each retained exactly 80 IMMA.SP instructions: 20 m16n8k32, 40 m16n8k64, and 20 m16n8k128. The 16 raw and four compatibility calls added by this batch account for 20 instructions. The coverage kernel is unlaunched, so runtime validation remains unexecuted.

records.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 7.1 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.representation: convergent standard sparse m16n8k64 wrapping s4-by-u4 INT4 inline PTX through CUDA 13.3 libNVVM
stages.detail: The same 7,822-byte NVVM IR fixture (SHA-256 ea46feacc7fcd1c5ae768178ec7ad5cb97a85c892ca6317fbe4a13c72dafbc33) passed CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and produced 4,979-byte NUL-terminated PTX (SHA-256 abe6ae9238f6137de91c9c2214fc9d7aa78da2bdd6d60a75013f45866c60c38f) containing all eight variants with selectors 0 and 1. Every standard-metadata nibble must encode two distinct 2-bit indices; 0x0, 0x5, 0xa, and 0xf are undefined behavior. This record retained exact wrapping s4-by-u4 PTX. Production cargo oxide emit-ltoir generated_intrinsics --arch=sm_80 emitted 374,720-byte NVVM IR (SHA-256 d8180177c4f4e54c641636f7d894fa01314ca6c9251a423ef9027e1985ae120b) and 104,032-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 9f451bb1d66eb39596d0639eb95cf2712e82975f518cf89829eaf18fb5fb15f0). Its 25-byte sm_80 target manifest (SHA-256 06ecfb1b0100fd9886f26871a9fc48350b612a35370b154b07d83a3a57fbbadb) and 49-byte compile-options file (SHA-256 069d630cf5359ec49a571d9074d106aeda207bc279693d2a9ce3c21b168ad03a) pin the production inputs.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 emitted standard sparse m16n8k64 INT4 PTX
stages.detail: After removing libNVVM's single trailing NUL, CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 4,978-byte PTX (SHA-256 7b24a91e649c24cd57c20d6923a0940730b9465107178b227921b8d5f0a478d2), issued only the ordered-metadata performance advisory, and produced a 4,008-byte cubin (SHA-256 109d906a6082234019e136181d47d7306c65edbedf5c47e3c46ef56635fa6ca6) with exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. The PTX 7.0, sm_75, selector 2, and dynamic-selector negatives are recorded by the paired pinned-LLVM evidence.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and nvJitLink standard sparse m16n8k64 INT4 fixture
stages.detail: The direct CUDA 13.3 libNVVM-to-nvJitLink route produced a 4,008-byte cubin with SHA-256 3cc463ee7fdde107bbd51039c7a2259f62196923d049c78703e3662cccc378f5 retaining exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. Production linking of that LTOIR through the repository nvJitLink helper produced a 30,952-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 9c9f270e43b9732e814f899d9aeba2dc6f20aef85769bc83eaae8e345cb82ae6). Independent 92,603-byte nvdisasm (SHA-256 dd862d50b376cc5ae8cd083b71d5da500a751b44c4016ab5d6b3c838960cbc7e) and 349,080-byte cuobjdump (SHA-256 44f234c740a4c6f1b3dd917b979a9f495e7e838343130185febc9c604a3e84ca) views each retained exactly 80 IMMA.SP instructions: 20 m16n8k32, 40 m16n8k64, and 20 m16n8k128. The 16 raw and four compatibility calls added by this batch account for 20 instructions. The coverage kernel is unlaunched, so runtime validation remains unexecuted.

stages.detail: The direct CUDA 13.3 libNVVM-to-nvJitLink route produced a 4,008-byte cubin with SHA-256 3cc463ee7fdde107bbd51039c7a2259f62196923d049c78703e3662cccc378f5 retaining exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. Production linking of that LTOIR through the repository nvJitLink helper produced a 30,952-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 9c9f270e43b9732e814f899d9aeba2dc6f20aef85769bc83eaae8e345cb82ae6). Independent 92,603-byte nvdisasm (SHA-256 dd862d50b376cc5ae8cd083b71d5da500a751b44c4016ab5d6b3c838960cbc7e) and 349,080-byte cuobjdump (SHA-256 44f234c740a4c6f1b3dd917b979a9f495e7e838343130185febc9c604a3e84ca) views each retained exactly 80 IMMA.SP instructions: 20 m16n8k32, 40 m16n8k64, and 20 m16n8k128. Production cargo oxide emit-ltoir generated_intrinsics --arch=sm_80 emitted 374,720-byte NVVM IR (SHA-256 d8180177c4f4e54c641636f7d894fa01314ca6c9251a423ef9027e1985ae120b) and 104,032-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 9f451bb1d66eb39596d0639eb95cf2712e82975f518cf89829eaf18fb5fb15f0). Its 25-byte sm_80 target manifest (SHA-256 06ecfb1b0100fd9886f26871a9fc48350b612a35370b154b07d83a3a57fbbadb) and 49-byte compile-options file (SHA-256 069d630cf5359ec49a571d9074d106aeda207bc279693d2a9ce3c21b168ad03a) pin the production inputs.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 emitted standard sparse m16n8k128 INT4 PTX
stages.detail: After removing libNVVM's single trailing NUL, CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 3,810-byte PTX (SHA-256 302d6da269cd36de7991678afcc1b0c13be08302e4338bf9a170831d0e7f4dea), issued only the ordered-metadata performance advisory, and produced a 4,008-byte cubin (SHA-256 dca42ca41d8127353ab0a9a2aa1673bc9d5a1deff86d0c0aed18b7b5c88c4572) with exactly eight IMMA.SP.168128 instructions. The PTX 7.0, sm_75, selector 1, and dynamic-selector negatives are recorded by the paired pinned-LLVM evidence.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and nvJitLink standard sparse m16n8k128 INT4 fixture
stages.detail: The direct CUDA 13.3 libNVVM-to-nvJitLink route produced a 4,008-byte cubin with SHA-256 e304b99f1ddaddb561a7cf45c39fa3b97c5252091ffafbcca7577dfb60d395fc retaining exactly eight IMMA.SP.168128 instructions. Production linking of that LTOIR through the repository nvJitLink helper produced a 30,952-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 9c9f270e43b9732e814f899d9aeba2dc6f20aef85769bc83eaae8e345cb82ae6). Independent 92,603-byte nvdisasm (SHA-256 dd862d50b376cc5ae8cd083b71d5da500a751b44c4016ab5d6b3c838960cbc7e) and 349,080-byte cuobjdump (SHA-256 44f234c740a4c6f1b3dd917b979a9f495e7e838343130185febc9c604a3e84ca) views each retained exactly 80 IMMA.SP instructions: 20 m16n8k32, 40 m16n8k64, and 20 m16n8k128. The 16 raw and four compatibility calls added by this batch account for 20 instructions. The coverage kernel is unlaunched, so runtime validation remains unexecuted.
